<a id="class-dj-controller"></a>

# DJ_Controller

**Inherits:** `Node3D`

Central FLX4-style runtime controller. Owns deck state, transport, loop/cue/pad modes, and per-frame mixer/audio updates.

## Constants

<a id="class-dj-controller-constant-use-multi-threaded-looping"></a>

**Use_Multi_threaded_looping** = `true` [🔗](#class-dj-controller-constant-use-multi-threaded-looping)

Loop handling must stay threaded for stable runtime behaviour on target XR hardware. Disabling this has previously caused startup/runtime failures on device.

<a id="class-dj-controller-constant-loop-seek-cooldown-ms"></a>

There is currently no description for this constant. Please help us by [contributing one](https://contributing.godotengine.org/en/latest/documentation/class_reference.html)!

<a id="class-dj-controller-constant-beat-jump-steps-beats"></a>

**BEAT_JUMP_STEPS_BEATS** = `Array[float]([-1.0, 1.0, -2.0, 2.0, -4.0, 4.0, -8.0, 8.0])` [🔗](#class-dj-controller-constant-beat-jump-steps-beats)

FLX4 default Beat Jump mapping: pad 1/2 = -/+1 beat, 3/4 = -/+2 beats, 5/6 = -/+4 beats, 7/8 = -/+8 beats.

<a id="class-dj-controller-constant-key-shift-steps-semitones"></a>

**KEY_SHIFT_STEPS_SEMITONES** = `Array[int]([4, 5, 6, 7, 0, 1, 2, 3])` [🔗](#class-dj-controller-constant-key-shift-steps-semitones)

FLX4 default Key Shift mapping: pads 1..8 = +4, +5, +6, +7, 0, +1, +2, +3 semitones.

<a id="class-dj-controller-constant-performance-pad-colours"></a>

**PERFORMANCE_PAD_COLOURS** = `Array[Color]([Color(0.99, 0.46, 0.24, 1), Color(0.99, 0.73, 0.21, 1), Color(0.98, 0.93, 0.31, 1), Color(0.53, 0.91, 0.35, 1), Color(0.3, 0.86, 0.78, 1), Color(0.35, 0.64, 0.98, 1), Color(0.66, 0.47, 0.96, 1), Color(0.94, 0.37, 0.72, 1)])` [🔗](#class-dj-controller-constant-performance-pad-colours)

 **Update_Channel_Trim_EQ_CFX**() [🔗](#class-dj-controller-method-update-channel-trim-eq-cfx)
